package rulecoverage

func PositiveJsonValidThenUnmarshal() string {
    ruleID := "json_valid_then_unmarshal"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Code that validates JSON and then unmarshals the same payload again."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
